title: T-006 — mv_qc_holds_summary + mv_downtime_by_line MVs DDL (12-REPORTING §9.1, §10.1)
prompt:
# T-006 — QC Holds + Downtime materialized views

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §9.1, §10.1 (QC Holds dashboard), §6 D-RPT-7 (downtime categories consumer)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create `mv_qc_holds_summary` (consumer of 09-QUALITY `quality_holds` + `hold_items`) and `mv_downtime_by_line` (consumer of 08-PRODUCTION `downtime_events`). Both org-scoped + REC-L1 site_id + unique index for REFRESH CONCURRENTLY + RLS-via-service.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0083_reporting_mv_qc_downtime.sql`:
   - `mv_qc_holds_summary (org_id, site_id, date, line_id, product_id, reason_code, boxes_held, boxes_rejected, labour_hours, am_pm)` — selects from 09-QA quality_holds JOIN hold_items.
   - `mv_downtime_by_line (org_id, site_id, line_id, date, shift_id, people_mins, process_mins, plant_mins, total_mins)` — selects from 08-PROD downtime_events; categories from 02-SET `downtime_categories` ref table (D-RPT-7 People/Process/Plant baseline).
   - Unique indexes per MV (CONCURRENTLY prerequisite).
   - REVOKE PUBLIC + GRANT app_reporting_role only.
2. Drizzle entries in `packages/db/src/schema/reporting-views.ts` (extend T-003's file).
3. Service helpers `packages/reporting/src/queries/qc-holds.ts` + `downtime.ts` always emit `WHERE org_id = app.current_org_id() AND (site_id = $current OR site_id IS NULL)`.
4. Register both view names in `packages/reporting/src/mv-registry.ts` enum (from T-005).
5. Vitest contract test: (a) MVs + unique indexes exist, (b) cross-org leak test for both, (c) refresh-concurrently works on both, (d) service helper guardrail + org context check, (e) AM/PM split derived from hold_items.shift_id or time-of-day rule per §10.1 (verified with seeded data).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0083_reporting_mv_qc_downtime.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/reporting-views.ts [modify — extend]
- packages/reporting/src/queries/qc-holds.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/queries/downtime.ts [create]
- packages/reporting/src/mv-registry.ts [modify]
- packages/reporting/__tests__/mv-qc-downtime.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration 0083 runs, when `\d mv_qc_holds_summary` and `\d mv_downtime_by_line` are inspected, then declared columns + unique indexes exist; REVOKE PUBLIC applied.
2. Given two orgs have seeded 09-QA holds and 08-PROD downtime rows, when service helpers query under each org session, then cross-org leak test passes (zero leaks).
3. Given a hold row with shift_id mapped to AM and another to PM, when mv_qc_holds_summary is refreshed, then am_pm column reflects the shift mapping rule (NOT a client-side derivation).
4. Given downtime_events seeded with one row in 'People' category and one in 'Plant', when mv_downtime_by_line is refreshed, then people_mins and plant_mins reflect SUM grouped by category — using 02-SET `downtime_categories.classification` ref join, never a hardcoded category list.
5. Given both view names are registered in mv-registry enum (T-005), when the refresh worker is invoked, then both are eligible for REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY (5-min cadence for mv_qc_holds_summary, 2-min for mv_downtime_by_line).

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: `packages/reporting/__tests__/mv-qc-downtime.test.ts` mounts testcontainers Postgres, seeds 09-QA + 08-PROD rows, asserts 5 ACs incl. cross-org leak test.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/reporting test mv-qc-downtime`.
- GREEN: write migration + Drizzle entries + service helpers + enum update.

## Risk red lines
- Do not duplicate quality_holds aggregation logic — read 09-QUALITY tables only via MV (consumer pattern; no transactional joins on hot path per D-RPT-1).
- Do not hardcode downtime categories list — consume 02-SET `downtime_categories.classification` ref table per D-RPT-7.
- Do not skip unique index per MV (CONCURRENTLY refresh prerequisite).
- Do not let MV WHERE clauses run without service-helper org+site guard.
- Do not GRANT to PUBLIC; app_reporting_role only.
- Do not block on 09-QUALITY epics 09-d/09-e — only Holds (09-a) feeds this MV; NCR/HACCP/complaints are P2 (separate MV tasks).

pipeline_inputs.description: QC Holds summary MV (consumer 09-QA holds) + downtime-by-line MV (consumer 08-PROD downtime_events; categories from 02-SET ref).
pipeline_inputs.details: Consumer pattern: never duplicate aggregation logic, always read source MVs/tables via service helper with org+site filter. Categories come from 02-SET ref table per D-RPT-7 hierarchical taxonomy.
out_of_scope: Do not implement QC Holds dashboard UI here (T-019)
Do not implement OEE summary MV here (T-011)
Do not implement NCR Trend / HACCP MVs (P2)

Given two orgs have seeded 09-QA holds and 08-PROD downtime rows, when service helpers query under each org session, then cross-org leak test passes
Given infrastructure and compliance are checked, when verified, then am_pm column reflects the shift mapping rule and both are eligible for REFRESH CONCURRENTLY.
